other_observers: Nobody with me, but I was chasing reports of EAPW at this location made by several other birders.
description: The bird flew from tree branch to tree branch, stopping each time to perch and sing. The song was a textbook version of this species' song, which I would characterize as Peeeeeeee-a-weeeeeeee, without the urgency on the first note that is typical of Western Wood-Pewee.
